name: FiniteDifferenceMethod4PDES — OGC Building Block Register
abstract: OGC Building Block register for all ODE/PDE models implemented in FiniteDifferenceMethod4PDES (Java/Maven, MVC architecture). Covers 22 local kinetic models across 4 complexity tiers, 4 Holling functional response components, and 2 spatial operators, all described using SOSA, PROV-O and STAC 1.0.

bblocks.name: Initial Observation (SOSA)
bblocks.abstract: SOSA ObservationCollection providing initial state variables and control parameters for any model run. resultTime becomes t=0 of the simulation.

bblocks.name: Spatial Advection Operator
bblocks.abstract: Linear advection term -v·∇u. Implemented in model.global.Advection.java. Combined with any local kinetic model and diffusion to produce a DIFICI travelling-wave system.

bblocks.name: Spatial Diffusion Operator
bblocks.abstract: Fickian diffusion term D·∇²u. Implemented in model.global.Diffusion.java. Combined with any local kinetic model to produce a reaction-diffusion PDE.

bblocks.name: Holling Type I Functional Response
bblocks.abstract: Linear prey consumption proportional to prey density. No handling time. Implemented in model/lokal/holling/HollingI.java.

bblocks.name: Holling Type II Functional Response
bblocks.abstract: Saturating Michaelis-Menten (disc equation) response. Implemented in model/lokal/holling/HollingII.java.

bblocks.name: Holling Type III Functional Response
bblocks.abstract: Sigmoid response — accelerating at low density, saturating at high. Implemented in model/lokal/holling/HollingIII.java.

bblocks.name: Holling Type IV Functional Response
bblocks.abstract: Inhibition / Monod-Haldane response — unimodal, decreasing at high prey density. Implemented in model/lokal/holling/HollingIV.java.

bblocks.name: Simulation Run (PROV)
bblocks.abstract: Generic PROV Activity capturing one execution of any local kinetic model in FiniteDifferenceMethod4PDES, optionally extended with spatial operators (Diffusion, Advection).

bblocks.name: Simulation Result STAC Item
bblocks.abstract: STAC 1.0 Item cataloguing outputs of any simulation run from FiniteDifferenceMethod4PDES, with plankton-rda extension for model-specific searchable properties.

bblocks.name: Lead Kinetics (Blei)
bblocks.abstract: One-compartment lead (Blei) kinetics model dX/dt = k_in - k_out·X. Implemented in Blei.java.

bblocks.name: China Population Model
bblocks.abstract: Two-component demographic or resource-competition model. China.java.

bblocks.name: Stock-Dependent Harvesting
bblocks.abstract: Logistic growth with proportional (stock-dependent) harvesting effort. Bestandsabhaengige_Ernte.java.

bblocks.name: Stock-Independent Harvesting
bblocks.abstract: Logistic growth with constant (stock-independent) harvest rate H. Bestandsunabhaengige_Ernte.java.

bblocks.name: Jansen Host-Parasitoid Model
bblocks.abstract: Jansen (1995) host-parasitoid model with density dependence. Jansen.java.

bblocks.name: Lorenz System
bblocks.abstract: Lorenz (1963) chaotic attractor: dx/dt=sigma(y-x), dy/dt=x(rho-z)-y, dz/dt=xy-beta·z. Lorenz.java.

bblocks.name: Lotka-Volterra Predator-Prey
bblocks.abstract: Classic Lotka-Volterra: dX/dt=a·X-b·X·Y, dY/dt=-c·Y+d·X·Y. Implemented in Lotka.java.

bblocks.name: Generic Plankton Model
bblocks.abstract: Simplified two-component phytoplankton-zooplankton model. Plankton.java.

bblocks.name: Rössler System
bblocks.abstract: Rössler (1976) chaotic system: dx/dt=-(y+z), dy/dt=x+a·y, dz/dt=b+z(x-c). Roessler.java.

bblocks.name: Scheffer Phytoplankton-Zooplankton (RDA)
bblocks.abstract: Scheffer (1991) phytoplankton/zooplankton predator-prey model with Holling II/III responses and optional diffusion/advection. Scheffer.java.

bblocks.name: Larch Budmoth (Tannentriebwickler)
bblocks.abstract: Zeiraphera diniana (larch budmoth) population cycle model. Tannentriebwickler.java.

bblocks.name: Tumor-Immune Interaction
bblocks.abstract: Two-component tumor growth and immune response model. Tumor.java.

bblocks.name: Volterra Predator-Prey with Carrying Capacity
bblocks.abstract: Extended Volterra with logistic prey: dX/dt=r·X(1-X/K)-a·X·Y, dY/dt=-c·Y+d·a·X·Y. Volterra.java.

bblocks.name: Fish Harvesting (Fischfang)
bblocks.abstract: Three-component fish harvesting model (prey-predator-effort or nutrient-fish-harvest). Fischfang.java.

bblocks.name: Schlögl Bistable Chemical Reaction
bblocks.abstract: Schlögl (1972) chemical bistability: dX/dt = k1·A·X²-k2·X³+k3·B-k4·X. Schloegl.java.

bblocks.name: Exponential Growth
bblocks.abstract: Single-species exponential growth dX/dt = r·X. Implemented in Exponentiell.java.

bblocks.name: Goal-Seeking Model
bblocks.abstract: Goal-seeking (target) dynamics dX/dt = r·(Z-X). Implemented in Zielsuchend.java.

bblocks.name: Linear ODE
bblocks.abstract: Linear scalar ODE dX/dt = a·X + b. Implemented in Linear.java.

bblocks.name: Logistic Growth
bblocks.abstract: Single-species logistic growth dX/dt = r·X·(1-X/K). Implemented in Logistisch.java.
